prompt:
Create an ultra-premium luxury fashion advertisement poster for designer high heels inspired by Vogue Arabia, Paris Fashion Week, and elite luxury editorials. Feature elegant glossy heels inside a cinematic luxury studio with reflective marble flooring, dramatic spotlight lighting, soft smoke atmosphere, and photorealistic reflections.

Add a modern luxury specification layout vertically on the left side with elegant typography and minimalist icons. Include a bold powerful quote and a large luxury brand logo with metallic chrome or gold reflections.

Use a rich cinematic color palette of black, gold, silver, emerald green, burgundy, or monochrome tones with glossy reflections, floating particles, velvet textures, and premium editorial composition.

Style should feel hyper-realistic, dark luxurious, modern, cinematic, ultra-detailed, and professionally designed like a billion-dollar fashion campaign and luxury billboard advertisement, 8K masterpiece.
